Home / Fortnite / Fortnite by Game Mode / Battle Royale / Gameplay (Battle Royale) / Legacy Achievements

Legacy Achievements

Legacy Achievements

Description

Mode

Battle Royale

Introduced

Update v11.00

Removed

Update v26.30

Overview

This page is about an item or mechanic that is present in the files but cannot be accessed through legitimate means.


Achievements (also known as Legacy Achievements) were a mechanic in Fortnite: Battle Royale added in Chapter 2: Season 1. Achievements were earned by completing specific tasks in the game. Those obtained during a particular season could be viewed under the Career tab in the main menu.

Achievements can no longer be viewed in the Career section as of the release of Update v26.30.

Achievements

  • C2S1
  • C2S2
  • C2S3
  • C2S4

  • C2S7
  • C2S8
  • C3S1
  • C3S2
  • C3S3
  • C3S4
  • C4S1
  • C4S2
  • C4S3
  • C4S4
